site.title: CVzzer
site.description: Create your CV, cover letter and application email tailored to every job offer with AI — 100% free

home.heroDescription: Paste your experience, skills and the job offer. Our AI generates a tailored CV, cover letter and application email — ready to send.
home.feature1Desc: AI reorganizes your experiences and skills to perfectly match each job offer.
home.feature2Desc: A personalized professional letter highlighting your strengths for the target position.
home.feature3Desc: A ready-to-send email to accompany your CV and cover letter.
home.feature4Desc: Choose from our carefully designed templates: Modern, Classic or Minimal.
home.feature5Desc: Download your CV as a high-quality PDF, ready to print or email.
home.feature6Desc: No subscription, no mandatory registration. Create as many CVs as you want.
home.step1Desc: Paste your summary, experiences and skills.
home.step2Desc: Copy-paste the job posting you're interested in.
home.step3Desc: Select the design that suits you.
home.step4Desc: Tailored CV + letter + email — generated in seconds.

builder.title: Build my CV
builder.step2Desc: List your technical and soft skills
builder.step3Desc: Paste the job offer you're interested in
builder.step5Desc: Your tailored CV, letter and email
builder.resumePlaceholder:
Paste your professional summary, experiences, education here...

Example:
Web developer with 5 years of experience in React and Node.js.
Worked at XYZ Corp from 2020 to 2024 as a senior developer...
builder.skillsPlaceholder:
List your skills separated by commas

Example: React, Node.js, TypeScript, Python, Project Management, Communication
builder.jobOfferPlaceholder:
Paste the full text of the job offer here...

Copy the posting from LinkedIn, Indeed, or any job board.
builder.resumeHint: You can also fill out the structured sections below for a better result.
builder.jobOfferHint: Paste the entire job posting for better targeting.
builder.tip1: Copy the full text of the job posting
builder.tip2: Include the job title and required skills
builder.tip3: The more detailed the offer, the better the result
builder.sidebarTip1: The more you detail your background, the better the generated CV.
builder.sidebarTip2: Paste the full job offer for optimal results.
builder.sidebarTip3: You can go back to any step at any time.
builder.githubRateLimit: GitHub API rate limit exceeded. Please try again later.
builder.githubEmpty: Please enter a valid GitHub URL or username.

results.editHint: Edit fields on the left or use AI at the bottom for complex changes

templates.title: Our Templates
templates.description: Choose the design that showcases your profile
templates.professionalDesc: Single column, airforce blue, CormorantGaramond/Charter, engineer style
templates.charlesDesc: Circular photo, Palatino, A4, European academic style
templates.rezumeDesc: Source Sans Pro, blue sections, modern developer style
templates.modern_imageDesc: Modern template based on Professional, with profile photo integration
templates.one_and_half_columnDesc: Modern 1.5 columns CV template with photo, icons, and Roboto style

common.adBlockMessage: This site is 100% free thanks to ads. Please disable your ad blocker to support us ❤️

history.title: Your CV History
history.subtitle: Find and edit your saved templates
history.noCvsDesc: Your saved CVs will appear here.
history.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this CV?
history.deleteError: Unable to download CV (LaTeX code may not be generated yet for this CV).
